creator: pyrus@bsdmail.com
text:
(In reply to mew14930xvi from comment #1)
Thank you, so much. I don't know if that could be enough for resolved. Wondering if the name should still be changed, but it's no longer urgent. Also, wondering if this port is obsolete and how it compares to the one in base.

It's ok by me if this is closed as is. Name changes of the manpages couldn't hurt either, if that's the route. I could do some testing of the port, and of the one in base system to make comparisons to see, if another report needs to be made.
